label: Subagent • live spawn analysis digest
query: Spawn an agent to produce a short structured analysis.
notes: LIVE. Runs the host + TextSubagentKind against an auto-seeded spawnable agent 'sparky', on the RUN model (the evaluator passes modelId as the spawn model override), so spawn is a real cross-model column instead of being pinned to the agent's own model. `seedSpawnableAgent` makes the runner create + allow-list 'sparky' for the run (and tear it down after), so the case runs on any host. Asserts a success spawn_result whose digest is a numbered three-item list — an instruction-following discriminator. SKIPS only when the run model itself isn't ready (e.g. a remote provider with no key).

subagent.input: List exactly three distinct, concrete use cases for a bounded subagent. Output one numbered line per use case and nothing else.
